name: construction contractors managing 5–10 projects simultaneously tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5–10 projects simultaneously, delays in project timelines cause penalties and cost overruns. We provide a tracking system instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: delays in project timelines leading to penalties and cost overruns
